Your Personal Morning Dashboard

James' Morning Briefing

Monday, March 23, 2026
Top Story

US-Iran War Escalates: Trump Issues Ultimatum on Strait of Hormuz

President Trump has issued an ultimatum demanding Iran fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz by Monday night or face US strikes on Iranian power plants. Iran has effectively closed the strategic waterway by attacking ships and reportedly laying mines, causing a major crisis in global energy markets. Iranian officials have threatened to attack critical civilian infrastructure in response.

Read Full Story →

World News

US-Iran War Escalates: Trump Issues Ultimatum on Strait of Hormuz

President Trump has issued an ultimatum demanding Iran fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz by Monday night or face US strikes on Iranian power plants. Iran has effectively closed the strategic waterway by attacking ships and reportedly laying mines, causing a major crisis in global energy markets. Iranian officials have threatened to attack critical civilian infrastructure in response.

undefined · Middle East Crisis · Read more

Israel Launches Fresh Strikes on Tehran and Beirut

The Israeli military has conducted fresh strikes on Tehran and Beirut, stating that its campaign against Hezbollah in Lebanon has 'only just begun.' The conflict continues to intensify with trading strikes between US-Israel and Iran.

undefined · Middle East Crisis · Read more

Russia Begins Spring-Summer 2026 Offensive

Russian forces have likely begun their anticipated Spring-Summer 2026 offensive against the Ukrainian Fortress Belt in Donetsk Oblast. Russian strikes on port infrastructure in Odesa have intensified dramatically, with over 180 strikes since the start of 2026 compared to 150 for all of 2025.

undefined · Russia-Ukraine War · Read more

Global Markets Slide as Gulf War Intensifies

World markets have rapidly reversed course as the conflict in the Middle East intensifies. Japan's Nikkei fell 3.5% and Chinese blue chips faced heavy losses. Analysts warn that if oil prices hit $100/barrel, global growth could drop 0.2 percentage points to 2.8% while inflation rises to 3.8%.

undefined · Global Economy · Read more

Seattle News

52° / 35°
Sunny
Sunny and clear today with temperatures rising through the day. Perfect spring weather with no precipitation expected.

I-405 Construction Impacts Shift South as Work Continues

WSDOT reports that construction impacts have shifted south on I-405 with ongoing work from March 20-23. The work includes tunnel maintenance causing longer backups approaching Bellevue in both directions, with congestion extending throughout the I-405 corridor. Delays are also possible on SR 520 ramps connecting to southbound I-405.

WSDOT · Read more

Multi-Vehicle Collision Blocks All Lanes of Northbound I-5 Near Sea-Tac Airport

All lanes of northbound I-5 near the Seattle-Tacoma International Airport were blocked early Monday morning due to a multi-vehicle collision. Commuters faced significant delays during the morning rush hour.

KIRO 7 · Read more

West Seattle Fireworks Mistaken for Gunfire

Reports of possible gunfire in the Beach Drive/Alki area of West Seattle prompted multiple 911 calls. Seattle Police investigated and determined the sounds were fireworks, not gunfire. A parked ambulance crew confirmed seeing fireworks in the area.

West Seattle Blog · Read more

Sea-Tac Airport Wrapping Up $399 Million Concourse C Expansion

As the FIFA World Cup in Seattle draws near, Seattle-Tacoma International Airport is completing its roughly $399 million expansion project on Concourse C. The expansion will help accommodate increased passenger traffic for the major international event.

MyNorthwest · Read more

Sports

Seattle Mariners (MLB)

Mariners Spring Breakout roster 2026 announced

Spring Breakout is back in 2026, creating a showcase-type opportunity for the best and brightest prospects. The Mariners are ranked No. 1 in MLB's 'most loaded' Spring Breakout rosters.

Mariners make 5 more roster moves as opener nears

The Seattle Mariners optioned three more players to Triple-A Tacoma and re-assigned two to minor league camp as spring training wraps up. Opening Day roster decisions are being finalized.

Read more

Seattle Seahawks (NFL)

Rashid Shaheed returns on three-year, $51 million deal

Wide receiver Rashid Shaheed returns to Seattle on a three-year, $51 million deal with $34.7 million guaranteed, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter.

Josh Jones remains with Seahawks on one-year deal

Offensive lineman Josh Jones remains with the Seahawks on a one-year deal, providing continuity on the offensive line.

Read more

Seattle Kraken (NHL)

Kraken unveil new black third jersey with sonar-inspired stripes

The Seattle Kraken unveiled a new third jersey for the 2025-26 season. The jersey is black with sonar-inspired stripes on the sleeves and socks.

Kraken defeat Panthers 6-2 in much-needed win

On March 15, the Seattle Kraken hosted the Florida Panthers and secured a 6-2 victory, their first meeting of the 2025-26 season.

Read more

Seattle Sounders FC (MLS)

Sounders play to scoreless draw with Minnesota United

The Seattle Sounders played to a scoreless draw with Minnesota United, recording their fourth shutout in five MLS matches this season.

Sounders to face Vancouver Whitecaps in Spokane for Concacaf Champions Cup

For the first time as an MLS club, the Seattle Sounders will play in Spokane at ONE Spokane Stadium for the second leg of the Concacaf Champions Cup against Vancouver Whitecaps.

Read more
